characters.appearance: Mid-30s male, slim build, fair complexion, with short light brown hair. He wears round tortoiseshell glasses and has light stubble.
characters.wardrobe: A navy blue crew neck sweater worn over a crisp white collared shirt.
characters.demeanor: Professional, earnest, and direct, maintaining constant eye contact with the camera.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मेरी English job पाने के लिए तो ठीक है। [My English is fine for getting a job.]
Character A says: पर promotion पाने के लिए काफी नहीं। [But not enough to get a promotion.]
Character A says: मैं 'we have a problem' बोलता हूँ, जबकि seniors 'we are facing a challenge' बोलते हैं। [I say 'we have a problem', while seniors say 'we are facing a challenge'.]
Character A says: ये छोटी बातें आपको junior ही रखती हैं, leader नहीं बनने देतीं। [These small things keep you as a junior, they don't let you become a leader.]
Character A says: Supernova ने मुझे सही English बोलना सिखाया। [Supernova taught me how to speak correct English.]
Character A says: इसके AI tutor के साथ मैंने real-world situations की practice की। [I practiced real-world situations with its AI tutor.]
Character A says: Office जाते हुए बस 10 मिनट। [Just 10 minutes while commuting to the office.]
Character A says: अब जब मैं बोलता हूँ, तो लोग सच में सुनते हैं। [Now when I speak, people actually listen.]
Character A says: Supernova download करो, और confidence से English बोलो। [Download Supernova, and speak English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core relatable problem: knowing enough English to work, but not enough to advance professionally.
- Highlights the emotional pain point of sounding junior or lacking the right professional vocabulary.
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor and daily practice as a quick, practical solution.
- Ends with an empowering payoff and a clear call to action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: मेरी English job पाने के लिए तो ठीक है। पर promotion पाने के लिए काफी नहीं। मैं 'we have a problem' बोलता हूँ, जबकि seniors 'we are facing a challenge' बोलते हैं। ये छोटी बातें आपको junior ही रखती हैं। Supernova ने मुझे सही English बोलना सिखाया। इसके AI tutor के साथ practice की। Office जाते हुए बस 10 मिनट। अब जब मैं बोलता हूँ, तो लोग सच में सुनते हैं। Supernova download करो, और confidence से English बोलो। >> Start speaking

scenes.scene_summary:
- Displays the Supernova app logo and branding.
- Reinforces the AI tutor value proposition.
- Provides a final, clear call to action to download.
